name: Ripple
description_short: Ripple Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution in Oshkosh, Wisconsin offering savings accounts, share certificates, auto loans, mortgages, and digital banking services.
description_long:
Ripple Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned credit union based in Oshkosh, Wisconsin at 429 N Sawyer Street. As a credit union, it operates under NCUA insurance rather than FDIC coverage, serving the Oshkosh community and surrounding areas. The institution has been established as a financial partner for members seeking traditional banking and lending services.

Ripple Credit Union offers a comprehensive range of deposit and loan products. On the deposit side, they provide checking accounts (including a Rewards Checking product), savings accounts, Club Accounts, ESCROW accounts, IRAs, Education Savings accounts, and Share Certificates—currently promoting a 10-month certificate special with 4.02% dividend rate and 4.081% APY on a $5,000 minimum. For borrowing, they offer auto and recreational vehicle financing (cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats, 4-wheelers, snowmobiles), lines of credit, and home mortgages advertised at 6.00% APY. They also provide an auto buying center to assist with vehicle shopping.

Ripple distinguishes itself through modern digital banking infrastructure, including a mobile app available for iOS and Android, real-time home banking platform with 24/7 access, bill pay capabilities, and electronic services like direct deposit, payroll deduction, automatic withdrawals, and auto pay. They maintain an ATM network through the Shazam system with fraud support (1-833-288-1126) and 24/7 card replacement services (1-855-219-5399). The credit union emphasizes convenience and member control, positioning itself as a full-service financial partner rather than a single-purpose lender.

As a regional credit union, Ripple's strengths lie in personalized service and competitive rates on standard products. However, the website provides limited information about membership eligibility requirements, specific loan terms, fees, or how their rates compare competitively. The institution serves a geographically limited footprint (Oshkosh area), which may limit convenience for members outside Wisconsin.
services: Share Certificates with competitive dividend rates
Mobile banking app with account access
Home banking platform with real-time updates
Automatic payment withdrawal and auto pay
pros: Competitive share certificate rates: 4.02% dividend/4.081% APY on 10-month certificates
Comprehensive digital banking: mobile app, real-time home banking platform, and 24/7 account access
Diverse loan products: auto/recreational vehicle financing, mortgages, lines of credit all available
Electronic payment convenience: direct deposit, bill pay, auto pay, payroll deduction, automatic withdrawals
Member-focused rewards: Rewards Checking account with benefits beyond basic checking
Dedicated fraud support: 24/7 Shazam debit card services with dedicated fraud line
Educational resources: calculators for mortgage, auto, and home loan payments
cons: Limited geographic footprint: only serving Oshkosh, Wisconsin area—inconvenient for non-local members
Sparse fee disclosure: website does not clearly outline account fees, overdraft fees, or loan origination costs
Vague rate information: mortgage rate (6.00%) appears outdated or incomplete; auto loan rates not specified on main site
Unclear membership eligibility: no published information about who can join the credit union
Limited branch presence: single branch location mentioned, reducing physical access compared to larger institutions
best_for: Oshkosh-area residents seeking full-service financial services with local branch access
Members prioritizing digital banking convenience and mobile-first account management
Consumers interested in auto/recreational vehicle financing and home mortgages from a community-focused lender
diagnosis: Ripple Credit Union is best for Oshkosh-area residents seeking a traditional, full-service credit union with strong digital banking capabilities and competitive rates on savings and loan products. The main caveat is geographic limitation—membership and convenient branch access are restricted to the Oshkosh, Wisconsin region, and the website lacks transparency on membership eligibility criteria and specific fee structures.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Ripple — Credit Union in Oshkosh, WI | CreditDoc
meta_description: Ripple — NCUA-insured credit union in Oshkosh, WI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
